How Roomi works

Your Place, Your Rules
Roomi helps you share a room or an entire home — on your terms. Welcome to the future of co-living!
A ROOMMATE FOR EVERYONE
Whether you're looking for a new BFF or just someone to split the rent, Roomi is the easiest roommate finder out there.
FLEXIBLE RENTING TERMS
Got rooms to rent? Find someone to move in with you – for three months or a year!
Sublet Safely
Trust and transparency are the keys to safely find rooms for rent. Let us help with that!
Background Checks by Garbo
Check to see if someone has a history of violent or harmful behavior.
SECURE IN-APP MESSAGING
Keep your contact info private by chatting to potential roommates through the Roomi app or website.
Rent Easier
Roomi makes finding cheap rooms or putting your house for rent easier than ever. Plus, everything is documented and verified.
Online Booking
Easily review booking requests from potential roommates. Once you approve their booking, we'll take your listing off the market and set up a secure payment.
SECURE PAYMENTS
Once you find a room, we hold and safely transfer your first month's rent payment to the lister. No sketchy, offline cash payments!
Looking for a room to rent?
Search rooms
Need to rent out a room?

Roomi Testimonials
Roomi is a quick and easy way to find a trustworthy roommate compared to other outlets. Nice to have an app that emphasizes security and provides quality service.
Elena
Found a Room
Put my room on Roomi and found multiple cool peeps interested in my apartment. Best of all, they had profiles I could easily vet before showing the room…Couldn't be happier with my new roommate and Roomi's customer service.
Alex
Filled a Room
Roomi was spot on. I was able to find a place within two weeks of me first using the app. I found a clean and affordable place just outside of NYC. I am thrilled about how things worked out!
CJ
